overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Star Wars Jedi game showing the protagonist exploring ancient ruins built into a desert canyon. The character traverses orange mineral terraces and narrow cliff edges before mounting a bipedal creature and riding toward a distant blue energy beacon.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient terraced mineral pools at base of cliff ruins

agents.ego_description: walking slowly across orange mineral terraces, surveying the massive ribcage structure built into the cliff face

entered.detail: massive skeletal ribcage built into the cliff face, dominating the skyline
stepped pools with orange and brown mineral deposits forming natural platforms
tall weathered stone cliff face with carved architectural details

segments.scene_description: The character walks across striking orange mineral terraces at the base of an enormous cliff. A massive skeletal ribcage structure is built into the rock face ahead, bathed in bright sunlight. The environment is arid with sparse red vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cliffside path overlooking deep canyon with suspended platforms

events.description: character transitions from walking to running along the cliff edge
terrain shifts from open terraces to narrow cliffside paths with views into the canyon depths

agents.ego_description: sprinting along narrow cliff edges and rocky outcrops, navigating the canyon rim with agility

entered.detail: floating or supported stone platforms with wooden structures spanning the canyon
deep chasm below the path with mist and distant structures visible
leafless twisted tree trunk on the cliff edge

segments.scene_description: The character breaks into a run along perilous cliffside paths. The camera follows as they navigate narrow ledges with a deep canyon drop on one side. Ancient suspended platforms are visible across the chasm, and the massive ribcage structure now appears on the right as the character circles the terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky plateau approaching ancient ruins entrance with energy beacon

events.description: approaching the main ruins entrance with a visible vertical blue energy beam
character mounts a bipedal creature and transitions from running to riding

agents.ego_description: running across the final rocky approach then mounting a bipedal creature and riding toward the blue light beacon

notable_agents.action: bipedal lizard-like mount being ridden toward the ruins entrance

entered.detail: vertical beam of blue energy light emanating from the ruins entrance
massive stone entrance to the ruins with carved architectural details

segments.scene_description: The character traverses the final rocky plateau toward the ruins entrance, where a bright blue energy beam pierces the sky. After a brief run, the character mounts a bipedal creature and rides the remaining distance toward the ancient facade, with the massive ribcage structure now visible again in the background center.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the base of a desert canyon up toward a distant energy beacon. It begins with the character walking across striking orange mineral terraces beneath an enormous cliff, where a massive skeletal ribcage structure is built into the sun-drenched rock face. As the character breaks into a run, the camera follows them along perilous cliffside paths and narrow ledges, circling the terrain while suspended platforms hang over the deep chasm. The scene then opens onto a final rocky plateau where a bright blue energy beam pierces the sky, drawing the character toward the ruins entrance. Finally, the character mounts a bipedal creature and rides toward the ancient facade, leaving the massive ribcage structure behind in the center of the background.
